iterations.theme: Luka Popov: Public Withdrawal, Faith, Science, Social Issues, and Modern Society
iterations.reason_for_cut: The entire podcast is a continuous interview with a single guest, covering various topics. Its total length (under 47 minutes) fits within the specified range for a single iteration, making a cut unnecessary and unnatural. The end time is chosen just before the host's concluding remarks and sign-off.

chapters.topic: Uvod i predstavljanje Luke Popova

Prednosti života u malom mjestu (Zlatar) za obitelj i zajednicu
